title: Product images
description: Upload clear product photos. The first image becomes the cover.
dropTitle: Drop images here, or choose files
dropDescription: JPEG, PNG, WebP, AVIF, or GIF. Up to 15 MB each.
importUrlHint: Paste a public image link. We''ll download it so you can upload it with your other files.
importUrlInvalid: Enter a valid http(s) image URL.
importUrlEmpty: The URL did not return an image.
importUrlTimeout: The image took too long to download. Try again.
importUrlUnauthorized: Sign in again to import images.
importUrlFailed: Could not import that image. Try another URL.
tooLarge: Images must be 15 MB or smaller.
uploadError: We could not upload this image. Try again.
emptyUrl: The upload completed without a public image URL.
libraryUploadDescription: Add reusable images to your merchant media library.
searchPlaceholder: Search by name, file name, or alt text
libraryLoadErrorDescription: The media library is temporarily unavailable. Refresh and try again.
deleteConfirmDescription: This removes the file from your library. Assets used by products cannot be deleted.
deleteSelectedDescription: Unused assets will be removed permanently. Assets used by products are skipped.
deleteError: This asset could not be deleted.
libraryEmptyDescription: Upload product photos and reusable images. They will appear here for products and future storefront use.
filteredEmptyDescription: Try a different search or clear filters to see more assets.
metadataDescription: Use a clear name and useful alternative text for accessibility.
altTextHint: Describe the image for customers who cannot see it.
saveError: Media details could not be saved.
chooseLibraryDescription: Select a reusable image already uploaded to this shop.
chooseLibraryDescriptionMultiple: Select one or more reusable images already uploaded to this shop.
pickerEmptyDescription: Upload images on the Media page first, then choose them here for products.
pickerSelectHint: Select an image to continue, or double-click to use it immediately.
pickerSelectHintMultiple: Select one or more images. Double-click an image to add it with your current selection.
coverHint: First image is the cover. Drag to reorder; star any image as cover.
inUseError: This asset is currently used by a product and cannot be deleted.
dropPageDescription: You can review the batch before anything uploads.
uploadComposerDescription: Add images, preview the batch, then start uploading. Progress continues in the queue so you can keep working.
dropZoneHint: Drop images here, or browse from your device
supportedFormats: JPEG, PNG, WebP, AVIF, or GIF · up to 15 MB each
reviewEmpty: Nothing queued yet. Add images to build this upload.
uploadStarted: Upload started. Track progress in the upload queue.
lightboxNavUnavailable: Only one image in this set
lightboxOpenUnavailable: Image is not ready to open yet
shellDescription: Upload, organize, and reuse merchant images across products and future storefront experiences.
